violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Documentation available during inspection shows certified food manager's certification has expired. Facility must have a certified food manager.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use items were found on the floor under the 3 compartment sink. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. 409 cleaning bottles were found stored on the counter near drink (order) storage area. Cleaning products should not be stored next to food items.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
